name: Gold Tone Minimalist Floral Pearl Necklace
description: Add delicate sophistication to your neckline with this gold-tone necklace. Featuring a minimalist four-petal floral charm alongside a petite faux pearl on a fine chain. Crafted with a premium anti-tarnish finish.

media.alt_text: Gold tone fine chain necklace with a small floral charm and a faux pearl

faqs.question: Is the pearl real?
faqs.answer: The necklace features a high-quality faux pearl designed to offer an elegant look with everyday durability.

faqs.question: Can I wear this everyday?
faqs.answer: Yes, it features a durable anti-tarnish finish, making it a beautiful and reliable accessory for daily wear.

meta_title: Gold Tone Floral Pearl Necklace | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop our Gold Tone Minimalist Floral Pearl Necklace. Featuring a delicate flower charm, a faux pearl, and a lasting anti-tarnish finish.
